source: A BSV mainnet block with two transactions, fetched live from a public BSV explorer (https://api.whatsonchain.com/v1/bsv/main/block/hash/<block_hash>). Used to verify the implementation against a real BSV-anchored Merkle root.
notes: Display order = big-endian as shown by BSV explorers. The Merkle algorithm hashes the byte-reverse (internal little-endian) of these txids. The expected_merkle_root is the published BSV header field.
